item.title: Sleepy squirrels
item.description: A group of squirrels is called a "dray" or a "scurry".
item.dc:creator: wolfwinter

item.title: Going to be very vulnerable here
item.description: 4 years ago I crushed both feet, both legs, left hip, right knee, pelvis, and lower spine. I was completely non weight bearing for 2 years, had multiple corrective surgeries, got custom leg braces made. I was told I'd never stand, so I stood. I was told I would never walk, so I walked with the help of my braces. Being bed and wheelchair bound so long, though, I gained a bunch of weight. But I wanted to share a moment of great triumph with everyone About a week ago now, I managed to take my first steps without my leg braces! I've been dieting and working hard, and I wanted to share this moment even though I may get made fun of for my weight. If it helps one person keep going, it will be worth it.
item.dc:creator: Bloodyvalentine549

item.title: "I will not let you choose what I say"

item.title: Hexia hairstyles!
item.description: A commission I did! Hexia with different hairstyles! This was really fun, I am quite partial to short hair hexia. Very cute. What’s your fave? item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Return of the meme: 1369 (edm therapy)
item.description:
Let's.... you guys can get the bread. I have really bad food poisoning.
Check your wifi.
I'm too blah for commentary. Sorry.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I love you I love you okay okay okay." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: In Japan, there is a 12.5-meter-high wall built exclusively to contain tsunamis. After the 2011 disaster, the 395-km-long "Great Tsunami" was built. The construction was designed to withstand the impact of a wave of 16 million tons of water.
item.description: It includes the planting of 9 million trees on the ocean shore as a secondary dam.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: when you glitch on the z-axis and clip through the street itself
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: Norm
item.description:
I made a post 2 days ago asking for help to see my doctor and pick up the antibiotics the ER prescribed me It didn't do well.. I've got a low goal set, just enough for the doctor and meds. I have a giant abscess the size of a Snickers bar, or hot dog, in my perineum (pelvic floor) behind scrotum, between legs - I can't sit or squat, when I do blood and nasty oozes out, and walking is very painful, I look like a handicapped penguin I just want the stupid thing to heal, I desperately need to get back to work :( If anyone has any extra that they could spare to help, I would be immensely grateful - but PLEASE don't hurt your own situation I hate the judgment and being a burden on people, but I really don't have anyone I can ask, I have no support network at all. OP: imgur.com/gallery/YlXh7oe Pool: paypal.com/pool/9f4bqeugz5 Or ko-fi: ko-fi.com/BoobJiggle -- Sorry to intrude, and for being a nuisance. I hope everyone has a wonderful weekend
Have a wonderful weekend everyone!
item.dc:creator: BoobJiggle

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
MrPuckett here excited to be back for the TheFreePizzaDude! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels we all love you so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
Puckett Jr is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,393 meals since we started 1,110 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 240 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 300 5th and 6th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 325 7th, 8th, 9th and 10th by @OP 435 11th, 12th, 13th and 14th by @OP 500 15th by Pizza Angel @DragonStrike911 525 16th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 545 17th, 18th, 19th and 20th by @OP 620 21st, 22nd and Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @maddoxonelung 645 Kobe Bryant, 25th, 26th and 27th by @OP 730 28th and 29th by Pizza Angel @gablestout 748 30th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 800 31st by Pizza Angel @maddoxonelung 32nd, 33rd, 34th and 35th by Pizza Angel @ellsseeawesomesauce ... Today's Grocery Tally 245 1st by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 305 2nd by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 400 3rd by Grocery Angel @IMPICKLERICK 500 4th by Grocery Angel @AyatollahBahloni 530 5th by Grocery Angel @DragonStrike911 700 6th by @OP ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 35 meals Filled 6 huge grocery orders That's 15,427 meals since we started 1,116 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Some ADHD memes
item.description: My ADHD, lupus, and depression are battling to see who can make me the most miserable tonight. Instead of doing anything about any of them, I'm couch rotting and making meme dumps for each. Here I present: ADHD
item.dc:creator: ThisIsMyMegaron

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Mini Dump pt 214
item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: irish
item.description:
source: vivienne_in_nyc on tt notes: Native language of Ireland: Irish This is the English name for that language. In Irish itself it’s called Gaeilge. It is not correct to say an Irish person speaks Gaelic. They speak Irish or Gaeilge. Gaelic is another term for these three Goidelic languages: Irish Scot’s Gaelic Manx (spoken in the Isle of Man) The Goidelic languages are part of the Celtic Languages. There are two groups of Celtic languages: the Goidelic and the Brittonic. As stated before the three Goidelic languages are Irish Scot’s Gaelic Manx (spoken in the Isle of Man) And the three Brittonic languages are Breton Cornish Welsh
Here are how some Irish girl names are pronounced. source: caoimhe.mcx in tt
some more name pronunciations
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: I'll drink to these cats, to a long full life

item.title: Miss him
item.description: I made a post 2 days ago asking for help to see my doctor and pick up the antibiotics the ER prescribed me It didn't do well.. I've got a low goal set, just enough for the doctor and meds. I have a giant abscess the size of a Snickers bar, or hot dog, in my perineum (pelvic floor) behind scrotum, between legs - I can't sit or squat, when I do blood and nasty oozes out, and walking is very painful, I look like a handicapped penguin I just want the stupid thing to heal, I desperately need to get back to work :( If anyone has any extra that they could spare to help, I would be immensely grateful - but PLEASE don't hurt your own situation I hate the judgment and being a burden on people, but I really don't have anyone I can ask, I have no support network at all. OP: imgur.com/gallery/YlXh7oe Pool: paypal.com/pool/9f4bqeugz5 Or ko-fi: ko-fi.com/BoobJiggle -- Sorry to intrude, and for being a nuisance. I hope everyone has a wonderful weekend

item.title: I’m both these people
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes, my dudes! All the email comments reminded me of the time I hit reply all on an email with a mailing list of over 80 people, it was 1 line email response that said : Roger that, thank you mama! I meant to say Thank you Ma’am but iPhone decided, nah that autocorrect is more fun. Mortified doesn’t even cover it.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Ok... Who the fuck asked you tho.
item.description: Happened 8 years ago. Randomly remembered it today. I still don't get what my appearance have to do with my political views.

Please and thank you

Goddammit
Stay fresh, cheesebags!
item.dc:creator: Atrickissomethingawhoredoesformoneyorcocaine

item.title: Lost 110 lbs in a year after hitting rock bottom. Here’s what changed everything
item.description: My highest weight was 265 lbs. At that time, I was experiencing professional burnout and depression. My legs would start to hurt after a while, and my feet could no longer support my weight well. I had trouble climbing stairs or even taking a few quick steps. I knew things couldn’t go on like this. I have a young son, and I want to be a good mother to him — someone he can play and have fun with. My husband, the father of our child, has always supported me and stood by my side through everything. I decided to undergo bariatric surgery, and within a year, I was fortunate enough to lose around 110 pounds. It wasn’t an easy journey, but I’ve never regretted it. It’s important to understand that the surgery is just a tool; as they say, the mind isn’t operated on. Now, a year later, I’m incredibly happy that I made this decision. For me, it was the best choice I could have made.
item.dc:creator: Anesidora4

item.title: Wait! Loving Reaper
item.description: So, it's that time of year again. Let's not leave our pets or babies in roasting hot cars, please. Every single year, I read about at least one instance of this happening. There is no "But I just needed to pick something up real quick!". The artist is Jenny Jinya, this is from Loving Reaper series. You can find this comic and others at: https://m.webtoons.com/en/canvas/loving-reaper/wait/viewer?title_no=353275&episode_no=42
item.dc:creator: IgnisInvictus

item.title: TEN weeks clean from selfharm!
item.description: Such a milestone ❤️ Both love and hate the journey, but I love not having to hide new scars now as it's super summer-y here
item.dc:creator: dotnote
